nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes:
Runs every 1 minute.
Why: polls for new PENDING clock-in submissions to validate.

nodes.name: Read ClockInSubmissions
nodes.notes:
Reads all rows from the ClockInSubmissions tab.
Why: next node filters to PENDING only.

nodes.name: Only PENDING
nodes.notes:
Keeps only rows where processingStatus=PENDING.
Why: already-processed rows (APPROVED/REJECTED) should not be re-validated.

nodes.name: Get Booking
nodes.notes:
Looks up the CleaningJobs row by bookingUid.
Why: we need the assigned cleanerId and propertyUid to validate against.

nodes.name: Merge Submission and Job
nodes.notes:
Combines the submission data with the CleaningJobs data.
Why: validation needs both the form submission and the job details in one object.

nodes.name: Validate Cleaner Assignment
nodes.notes:
Checks if cleanerIdFromForm matches cleanerId in CleaningJobs.
Why: only the assigned cleaner should be able to clock in for a job.

value.resultMessage: Cleaner not assigned to this booking

nodes.name: Reject Cleaner Not Assigned
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with message 'Cleaner not assigned to this booking'.
Why: someone tried to clock in for a job they're not assigned to.

parameters.jsCode:
// Pass through TRUE-branch items so Merge Coords can reference them reliably.
return $input.all();

nodes.name: Pass TRUE items
nodes.notes:
Passes through items that passed cleaner validation.
Why: holds them for the merge with property coordinates.

nodes.name: Merge Coords with Submission
nodes.notes:
Combines submission+job data with property coordinates by position.
Why: the distance calculation needs both GPS points in one object.

nodes.name: Get Property Coordinates
nodes.notes:
Looks up latitude/longitude from the Properties tab by propertyUid.
Why: we compare the cleaner's GPS against the property location.

nodes.name: DistanceCalculation
nodes.notes:
Haversine formula: calculates meters between cleaner GPS and property GPS.
Why: determines if the cleaner is physically at the property.

nodes.name: Radius Check
nodes.notes:
Branches: TRUE = within 100m (approve), FALSE = too far (reject).
Why: 100m radius ensures the cleaner is actually on-site.

nodes.name: Update APPROVED
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=APPROVED and resultMessage in ClockInSubmissions.
Why: marks this submission as validated and accepted.

nodes.name: Update CleaningJobs
nodes.notes:
Sets status=IN_PROGRESS, writes clockInTimeUTC and GPS data to CleaningJobs.
Why: the cleaning has officially started â€” job status reflects reality.

nodes.name: Update REJECTED (radius)
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with distance info in ClockInSubmissions.
Why: cleaner is too far from the property â€” GPS check failed.

nodes.name: Refining feilds
nodes.notes:
Extracts just the coordinate fields from the property lookup.
Why: clean data for the merge â€” only lat/lng needed.

nodes.name: Edit Fields
nodes.notes:
Restructures fields before the next step.
Why: ensures the right data shape for downstream nodes.

parameters.subject: Clock-In Rejected â€“ Location Outside Allowed Radius

nodes.name: Send Rejected message
nodes.notes:
Emails the cleaner that their clock-in was rejected.
Why: cleaner needs to know they must go to the correct location and try again.

nodes.name: No Operation, do nothing
nodes.notes:
No-op placeholder.
Why: fallback path that intentionally does nothing.

nodes.name: Getting Cleaners Profile
nodes.notes:
Looks up the cleaner details from CleanersProfile tab.
Why: needed for cleaner email and name in approval/rejection messages.

nodes.name: Checking If Cleaner Exists
nodes.notes:
Verifies the cleaner profile was found.
Why: prevents errors if the cleanerId from the form does not match any profile.

nodes.name: Updating Status in Reservation
nodes.notes:
Sets cleaningStatus=IN_PROGRESS on the Reservations tab.
Why: keeps Reservations in sync with CleaningJobs when clock-in is approved.

parameters.subject: Clock-In Confirmed â€“ {{ $('Radius Check').item.json['propertyName '] }}

nodes.name: Send Aprooved Message
nodes.notes:
Emails the cleaner confirming their clock-in was accepted.
Why: cleaner gets confirmation they are checked in and can start cleaning.

parameters.content:
**Schedule Trigger**

Runs every 1 minute.
Why: polls for new PENDING clock-in submissions to validate.

**Read ClockInSubmissions**

Reads all rows from the ClockInSubmissions tab.
Why: next node filters to PENDING only.

**Only PENDING**

Keeps only rows where processingStatus=PENDING.
Why: already-processed rows (APPROVED/REJECTED) should not be re-validated.

**Get Booking**

Looks up the CleaningJobs row by bookingUid.
Why: we need the assigned cleanerId and propertyUid to validate against.

**Merge Submission and Job**

Combines the submission data with the CleaningJobs data.
Why: validation needs both the form submission and the job details in one object.

**Validate Cleaner Assignment**

Checks if cleanerIdFromForm matches cleanerId in CleaningJobs.
Why: only the assigned cleaner should be able to clock in for a job.

**Reject Cleaner Not Assigned**

Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with message 'Cleaner not assigned to this booking'.
Why: someone tried to clock in for a job they're not assigned to.

**Pass TRUE items**

Passes through items that passed cleaner validation.
Why: holds them for the merge with property coordinates.

**Merge Coords with Submission**

Combines submission+job data with property coordinates by position.
Why: the distance calculation needs both GPS points in one object.

**Get Property Coordinates**

Looks up latitude/longitude from the Properties tab by propertyUid.
Why: we compare the cleaner's GPS against the property location.

**DistanceCalculation**

Haversine formula: calculates meters between cleaner GPS and property GPS.
Why: determines if the cleaner is physically at the property.

**Radius Check**

Branches: TRUE = within 100m (approve), FALSE = too far (reject).
Why: 100m radius ensures the cleaner is actually on-site.

**Update APPROVED**

Sets processingStatus=APPROVED and resultMessage in ClockInSubmissions.
Why: marks this submission as validated and accepted.

**Update CleaningJobs**

Sets status=IN_PROGRESS, writes clockInTimeUTC and GPS data to CleaningJobs.
Why: the cleaning has officially started â€” job status reflects reality.

**Update REJECTED (radius)**

Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with distance info in ClockInSubmissions.
Why: cleaner is too far from the property â€” GPS check failed.

**Refining feilds**

Extracts just the coordinate fields from the property lookup.
Why: clean data for the merge â€” only lat/lng needed.

**Edit Fields**

Restructures fields before the next step.
Why: ensures the right data shape for downstream nodes.

**Send Rejected message**

Emails the cleaner that their clock-in was rejected.
Why: cleaner needs to know they must go to the correct location and try again.

**No Operation, do nothing**

No-op placeholder.
Why: fallback path that intentionally does nothing.

**Getting Cleaners Profile**

Looks up the cleaner details from CleanersProfile tab.
Why: needed for cleaner email and name in approval/rejection messages.

**Checking If Cleaner Exists**

Verifies the cleaner profile was found.
Why: prevents errors if the cleanerId from the form does not match any profile.

**Updating Status in Reservation**

Sets cleaningStatus=IN_PROGRESS on the Reservations tab.
Why: keeps Reservations in sync with CleaningJobs when clock-in is approved.

**Send Aprooved Message**

Emails the cleaner confirming their clock-in was accepted.
Why: cleaner gets confirmation they are checked in and can start cleaning.
